Bash(ls /data/haotianwu/biojson/data/*_nutri_plant_verified.json | wc -l && echo "---genes---" && python3 -c "
import json, glob
total = 0
for f in glob.glob\('/data/haotianwu/biojson/data/*_nutri_plant_verified.json'\):
    d = json.load\(open\(f\)\)
    for t in ['Pathway_Genes','Regulation_Genes','Common_Genes']:
        total += len\(d.get\(t, []\)\)
print\(f'Total genes: {total}'\)
")
